notice: 1.3.0 is here: import an existing HAP project straight from its PDF report, save a copy of your workbook, and send feedback from the app. Thanks for testing SSI!
notes: 1.3.0 - import an existing HAP project straight from its PDF report (Import HAP report), Save a copy of the loaded workbook, Share feedback from the app, and new-report / update highlights on the toolbar. Just click Update now.
